SHMI 1.0.0

Package index

Core Workflow

prepare_shmi_inputs()
Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook
build_shmi()
Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs

Pillar Functions

compute_w.cover()
Compute the SHMI Cover Pillar (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence)
compute_rot_diversity()
Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers)
compute_avg_annual_disturbance()
Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric)
compute_orginput()
Compute the Organic Inputs Pillar (Amendments + Animals)

Helper Functions

get_shmi_example()
Load the example SHMI Excel file
get_shmi_template()
Get the SHMI Excel template
copy_shmi_example()
Copy the example SHMI Excel file to a local path
SHMI SHMI-package
SHMI: Soil Health Management Index
